jobs.title: Data Scientist
key_gaps: Experience in NLP and predictive analytics
Experience with big data frameworks and cloud deployment
jobs.rationale: Ben has strong Python and data analysis skills but lacks specific experience in NLP and big data frameworks required for this Data Scientist role.
jobs.job_summary: The Data Scientist role at Joveo Ai involves building and deploying NLP models and predictive algorithms to optimize job embeddings and applicant forecasting, working closely with product managers and software engineers.
top_qualifications: Proven experience in building machine learning models, specifically in NLP and predictive analytics
Proficiency in Python and relevant libraries (NumPy, Pandas, SciPy, Gensim)
Experience with big data frameworks and deploying models into cloud environments

jobs.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer - AI Enabler Team
key_gaps: Experience with cloud platforms and containerized environments (e.g., Kubernetes)

jobs.rationale: Ben has relevant skills in Python and machine learning, but lacks specific experience with cloud platforms and distributed systems, which are critical for this role.
jobs.job_summary: The Senior Machine Learning Engineer will design and optimize machine learning pipelines for large-scale environments, focusing on AI and cloud infrastructure while collaborating with cross-functional teams.
top_qualifications: 5+ years of hands-on experience in machine learning
Expertise in ML inference optimization techniques

jobs.title: Senior Machine Learning Scientist I

jobs.job_summary: The Senior Machine Learning Scientist will design, develop, and evaluate machine learning solutions for customer-facing applications, focusing on multimodal machine learning techniques and collaboration with cross-functional teams.
top_qualifications: Advanced knowledge and experience in Computer Vision and Natural Language Processing
Experience designing and executing end-to-end research and development plans
Relevant work or academic experience involved in the application of Machine Learning to business problems

jobs.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer: ML Recall

jobs.job_summary: This role involves designing and optimizing machine learning systems for an ecommerce search and discovery platform, focusing on NLP and multimodal models to enhance user experience and business outcomes.
top_qualifications: 3+ years of professional experience in applied machine learning
Strong expertise in NLP, particularly transformer-based models
Advanced Python skills and hands-on experience with deep learning frameworks (PyTorch preferred)
